subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims, spoken on 1906-06-29
subcodes.first_line: Were the whole world to act together in order to prevent these stars from giving light - verily they will fail to do so. Now, see how unwise are the enemies of the Cause
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @growth of the Cause, @martyrdom of the Bab, @oneness; unity of religion, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @rejection, opposition and persecution
